layout_dets.text: The person or property to be searched, described above, is believedt conceal idetif te person or desribe the propery

layout_dets.text: I find that the afidavit(s), or any recorded testimony, establish probable cause to search and seize the person or

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The search and seizure are related to violation(s) of (insertsatutory citations):

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: AO 93 (SDNY Rev. 01/17) Search and Seizure Warrant (Page 2)

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ATTACHMENT A

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: A. Evidence, Fruits, and Instruimentalities of the Subject Offenses

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The items to be seized from the Subject Premises also include:

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: I. Premises to be Searched—Subject Premises

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The premises to be searched (the "Subject Premises") are described as a multi-story

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: single-family residence located at 9 East 71st Street, New York, New York, and include al locked

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and closed containers found therein. A photograph of the front entrance to the Subject Premises

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: is included below:

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: This warrant authorizes the seizure of certain evidence, fruits, and instrumentalities of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: violations of Title 18, United States Code, Sections 1591 (sex trafficking of minors), and 371 (sex

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: trafficking conspiracy) (the "Subject Offenses") described as follows:

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: II. Items to Be Seized

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The items to be seized from the Subject Premises are any computer devices and storage

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: media that may contain any electronically stored information falling within the categories set forth

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: in Section B of this Attachment, including, but not limited to, desktop and laptop computers, disk

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: drives, modems, thumb drives, personal digital assistants, smart phones, digital cameras, scanners,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: routers, modems, and network equipment used to connect to the Internet. In lieu of seizing any

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: such computer devices or storage media, this warrant also authorizes, in the alternative, the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: copying of such devices or media for later review.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: C. Review of ESI

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: B. Search and Seizure of Electronically Stored Information

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Any items or records needed to access the data stored·on any seized or copied

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: computer devices or storage media, including but not limited to any physical keys, encryption

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: devices, or records of login credentials, passwords, private encryption keys, or similar information.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Any items or records that may facilitate a forensic examination of the computer

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: devices or storage media, including any hardware or software manuals or other information

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: concerning the configuration of the seized or copied computer devices or storage media.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: As set forth in Section A to this attachment, this warrant authorizes the search of the Subject

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Premises for any computer devices and storage media that may contain any electronically stored

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: information falling within the categories set forth below:

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: In conducting this review, law enforcement personnel may use various techniques to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: determine which files or other ESI contain evidence or fruits of the Subject Offenses. Such

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: techniques may include, for example:

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Law enforcement personnel (including, in addition to law enforcement officers and agents,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and depending on the nature of the ESI and the status of the investigation and related proceedings,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: attorneys for the government, attorney support staff, agency personnel assisting the government in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: this investigation, and outside technical cxperts under government control) will create a forensic

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: image of the Subject Devices (if practicable) and review the ESI contained therein for information

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: responsive to the warrant, that is, for the materials specified in Section B of this Attachment.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Any evidence concerning the identities or locations of those persons with access to,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: control over, or ownership of the seized or copied computer devices or storage media.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Any documents or communications with or regarding victims or potential victims

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of the Subject Offenses;

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Any nude, partially nude, or sexually suggestive photographs of individuals who

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: appear to be teenage girls, or younger;

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Any child erotica, defined as suggestive visual depictions of nude minors that do

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: not constitute child pornography as defined by 18 U.S.C. 8 2256(8).

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Any photographs of victims or potential victims of the Subject Offenses;

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Records or other items that evidence ownership, control, or use of, or access to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: devices, storage media, and related electronic equipment used to access, transmit, or store

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: information relating to the Subject Offenses, including, but not limited to, sales receipts,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: warranties, bills for Internet access, handwritten notes, registry entries, configuration files, saved

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: usernames and passwords, user profiles, e-mail contacts, and photographs;

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: "scanning" storage areas to discover and possibly recover recently deleted data or

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: deliberately hidden files; and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: •reviewing metadata, system information, configuration files, registry data, and any

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: other information reflecting how, when, and by whom the computer was used.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Law enforcement personnel will make reasonable efforts to search only for files,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: documents, or other electronically stored information within the categories identified in Section

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: II.A of this Attachment. However, law enforcement personnel are authorized to conduct a

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: complete review of all the ESI from seized devices or storage media if necessary to evaluate its

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: contents and to locate all data responsive to the warrant.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 6 Keyword searches alone are typically inadequate to detect all relevant data. For one thing,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: keyword searches work only for text data, yet many types: of files, such' as images and videos, do

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: not store data as searchable text. Moreover, even as to text data, there may be information properly

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: subject to seizure but that is not captured by a keyword search because the information does not

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: contain the keywords being searched.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: surveying directories or folders and the individual files they contain (analogous to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: looking at the outside of a file cabinet for the markings it contains and opening a drawer

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: believed to contain pertinent files);

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: conducting a file-by-file review by "opening" or reading the first few "pages" of such

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: files in order to determine their precise contents (analogous to performing a cursory

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: examination of each document in a file cabinet to determine its relevance);

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: performing electronic keyword searches through all electronic storage areas to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: determine the existence and location of data potentially related to the subject matter of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the investigation6; and
